title: The Depths of Impel Down: Key Exchange
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #10, Ivankov, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #10, Ivankov, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: STOP PRYING INTO MY PAST, IVA...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I have an obligation to support you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tell everyone in New Kama Land...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're sure those three entered level 5?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yes, it was a perfect disguise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If not, and they got away again....

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Please be more punctual in the future!!

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #10, Ivankov, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down: key exchange.
